series.description: This is EIA's unadjusted refiner and blender net production rate; it is not refinery gross output, and valid net-production values can be negative. Weekly estimates are preliminary and can be revised. Reformulated motor gasoline is a component of finished motor gasoline. RBOB remains a blendstock until oxygenate blending is complete; do not add this child to its finished or total parent.
series.title: Unadjusted EIA refiner and blender net production — Reformulated motor gasoline

unsupported_levels.label: City / official local area
unsupported_levels.reason: EIA does not publish weekly reformulated motor gasoline production at city level.

unsupported_levels.label: County
unsupported_levels.reason: EIA does not publish weekly reformulated motor gasoline production at county level.

unsupported_levels.label: State / producing area
unsupported_levels.reason: EIA does not publish this exact weekly reformulated motor gasoline production series by state or producing area.

unsupported_levels.label: PADD subdistrict
unsupported_levels.reason: This exact weekly reformulated motor gasoline production series is published at PADD and U.S. levels, not by PADD subdistrict.

series.description: This is an end-of-week inventory level, not a weekly flow, demand measure, or available storage capacity. Weekly estimates are preliminary and can be revised. Reformulated motor gasoline is a component of finished motor gasoline. RBOB remains a blendstock until oxygenate blending is complete; do not add this child to its finished or total parent.

unsupported_levels.label: City / official local area
unsupported_levels.reason: EIA does not publish weekly reformulated motor gasoline stocks at city level.

unsupported_levels.reason: EIA does not publish this exact weekly reformulated motor gasoline stocks series by state or producing area.

unsupported_levels.label: PADD subdistrict
unsupported_levels.reason: This exact weekly reformulated motor gasoline stocks series is published at PADD and U.S. levels, not by PADD subdistrict.

series.description: This is an end-of-week inventory level, not a weekly flow, demand measure, or available storage capacity. Weekly estimates are preliminary and can be revised. Total motor gasoline is the inclusive gasoline headline: finished motor gasoline and motor gasoline blending components sit within its hierarchy. Never stack this parent with either child, and reconcile children to the published total before using a component sum.
series.title: Total motor gasoline stocks

unsupported_levels.label: City / official local area
unsupported_levels.reason: EIA does not publish weekly total motor gasoline stocks at city level.

unsupported_levels.label: County
unsupported_levels.reason: EIA does not publish weekly total motor gasoline stocks at county level.

unsupported_levels.label: State / producing area
unsupported_levels.reason: EIA does not publish this exact weekly total motor gasoline stocks series by state or producing area.

series.description: Exports are weekly average outbound flows and can be volatile because individual cargoes are large. This exact series is U.S.-only; do not allocate it to lower geographies. Kerosene-type jet fuel is a separate finished-product family. Do not combine it with distillate or gasoline totals merely because all are petroleum products.
series.title: Kerosene-type jet fuel exports

unsupported_levels.label: City / official local area
unsupported_levels.reason: EIA does not publish weekly kerosene-type jet fuel exports at city level.

unsupported_levels.reason: EIA does not publish this exact weekly kerosene-type jet fuel exports series by state or producing area.

unsupported_levels.label: PADD subdistrict
unsupported_levels.reason: This exact weekly kerosene-type jet fuel exports series is published at the U.S. level only, not by PADD subdistrict.

unsupported_levels.label: PADD
unsupported_levels.reason: This exact weekly kerosene-type jet fuel exports series is published at the U.S. level only, not by PADD.

series.description: Imports are weekly average flows into the EIA reporting boundary. PADD rows and the U.S. row are alternate source-published views; never add the U.S. total to PADD values. Kerosene-type jet fuel is a separate finished-product family. Do not combine it with distillate or gasoline totals merely because all are petroleum products.

series.description: Product supplied is an accounting-based implied-demand proxy, not measured end-user consumption. Weekly estimates are preliminary, can be revised, and can move with balancing adjustments. Kerosene-type jet fuel is a separate finished-product family. Do not combine it with distillate or gasoline totals merely because all are petroleum products.

series.description: Never average child percentages; aggregate compatible inputs and capacity first. Published utilization can legitimately exceed 100 percent and must not be capped.
series.title: Refinery utilization

unsupported_levels.label: City / official local area
unsupported_levels.reason: Weekly refinery utilization is not published for cities or individual refineries.

unsupported_levels.label: County
unsupported_levels.reason: Weekly refinery utilization is not published at county level.

unsupported_levels.label: State / producing area
unsupported_levels.reason: Do not allocate PADD utilization to states.

unsupported_levels.label: PADD subdistrict
unsupported_levels.reason: The selected utilization measure is published at PADD and U.S. levels only.
